programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Kerstin Forsberg has devoted her life to protecting Manta Rays in her native country of Peru. This magnificent species migrates here every year but is under serious threat from fishing in the region. With her organization, Planeta Oceano, Kerstin is engaging with the local community to ban harmful fishing practices and to include conservation in the local school curriculum, to ensure the future of the Manta Ray in Peru for centuries to come.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Sloths – famous around the world for their slow pace of life – are under threat. In Suriname, their numbers are falling at a staggering rate as their forest habitat is transformed into towns and roads. Since 2005, Monique Pool, nicknamed the Sloth Lady, has been working tirelessly to protect this unique species with a shelter for injured sloths and an area of forest protected from development to ensure that the local sloths have a safe place to live. Get up close with this amazing animal as she rescues sloths from urban areas, nurses injured sloths back to full health and releases them back into the forest.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.sub-title: The Leatherback Turtle, A Long Journey
programme.desc: On the immense beaches that separate the Atlantic Ocean from the tropical forest, Darly Itoumba and his team watch over the leatherback turtles every night. A veritable prehistoric animal emerging from the abyss of the ocean, leatherback turtles are threatened by human activities but tirelessly, they return to lay eggs on Gabonese beaches and under the benevolent gaze of Darly.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: The decline of the pangolin is staggering. Virtually exterminated from all over Asia, it still survives in Africa. But the Asian market demands ever increasing quantities, the value of its scales reaching disproportionate prices. A new symbol of human greed, the animal will not last long. Despite this dire fate, Tessa wants to believe in another future for the pangolin. She joined forces with the Aka pygmies in the great forest of the Congo Basin to come to the aid of this endearing animal, the last vestige of prehistoric times.

programme.title: Man Cave
programme.desc: Man Cave S1E1 — Electrifying art redefines the modern man's sanctuary. Bold and inspiring pieces radiate strength, courage, and vitality, transforming the space with elements of jazz, funk, and alternative hip-hop.

programme.title: Black Artists Now III
programme.desc: Black Artists Now S1E3 — A transcendent journey celebrating the vibrancy & diversity of black culture. From evocative photographs to vivid canvases, this collection pays homage to the global tapestry of black identity, uniting voices and visions that resonate with the soul.

programme.title: Featured Artist: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E1: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos — Explore Andrew Soria's mesmerizing digital photo collages in “Cityscape Mementos.” His unique artistic vision offers a fresh perspective on urban architecture and culture, inviting viewers to rediscover their own cities in a new light.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E3: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt — A fusion of the diverse artistic styles & visions of our featured artists. Erni Vales unleashes imagination with surreal creations that transport you to another world while Sam Heydt challenges perspectives with thought-provoking conceptual art.

programme.title: Colors of Pride
programme.desc: Colors of Pride S1E1 ⚊ Artwork collected in celebration of LGBTQ pride.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour S1E1 — A jubilant tribute capturing the essence of merriment and relaxation through a symphony of colors, paired with the musical genres of electro, deep house and lounge. Each piece bursts with bold, expressive designs celebrating the beauty of unwinding.

programme.title: Weeknight Chill
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E8: Shades of White — Showcasing a myriad of techniques, from delicate brushstrokes to intricate sculptures and photographs, all enveloped in the ethereal essence and clarity of white. These works create a serene atmosphere that immerses the viewer in quiet tranquility.

programme.title: Weeknight Chill
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E1 — Dive into a mesmerizing symphony of color and form with this bold abstract art collection. Immerse yourself in a journey where shapes dance, colors converse, and the music paints a cinematic soundscape occupying the space between mirage and reality.
